title: Stone Lodge Academy (Suffolk): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Stone Lodge Academy  URN: 141407  Notice issued to: Eastern Education Group Trust  Reason for issue: ‘requires significant improvement’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Jonathan Duff  DfE regional director office: East of England  Local authority: Suffolk County Council "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
